free_text: Low and medium energy deuteron-induced reactions on
27Al
Final data for 27Al
Preliminary data (27Al, Cu)
The variable energy U-120M cyclotron
The high purity natural Al and Cu foils (Goodfellow
product). The thickness of Al and Cu foils was 50 um
and 25 um, respectively.
The natural cupper has two stable isotope - 69.2% of
63Cu and 30.8% of 65Cu, and 15 natural aluminium
consists of 27Al isotope only.
The stock of eleven Al and eleven Cu foils were used.
Two calibrated HPGe detectors of 23 and 50%
efficiency and of FWHM 1.8 keV at 1.3 MeV.
Systematic error mostly from the charge of
deuteron beam current and the foils thicknesses
Statistical error
Data received from Dr. E.Simeckova
Entry approved by Dr. E.Simeckova

contribution of neutrons generated into a foil behind
the original one. This comment will be added to the
article, published at Phys.Rev.
